name: @joshcano/duckdb-bun
description: Bun-native DuckDB binding via bun:ffi over the libduckdb C API. Embeds libduckdb so `bun build --compile` yields a self-contained binary.
author: Josh Cano (https://github.com/joshcano)

scripts.lint: biome check src tests scripts examples
scripts.format: biome format --write src tests scripts examples
scripts.check: biome check --write src tests scripts examples
scripts.ci: biome check src tests scripts examples && bun test
